title: Thanatos
wikitext:
'Thanatos' is an ''Evangelion: [[End of Evangelion]] CD Single'' released in Japan on the 8th of January, 1997 on re-released on May 24, 2006. Published by Starchild, it consists of 5 tracks, one karaoke.         

[[Image:Images_end_of_evangelion_thanatos.jpeg|thumb|right|Thanatos: End of Evangelion CD Single Cover]]

==Soundtrack==
*[[Soul's Refrain]]
*[[Thanatos -If I can't be yours-]]
*Heart, Return to your origin
*[[Thanatos -If I can't be yours-]] "Nine Years After Mix"
*Soul's Refrain off vocal version/karaoke 

==Background Track==
The background theme used for Neon Genesis Evangelion was performed by the Eminence Orchestra and conducted and composed by Shiro Sagisu. The theme was produced by Hideaki Anno.

{{stub}}

[[Category:Music]]
html:
'Thanatos' is an Evangelion: End of Evangelion CD Single released in Japan on the 8th of January, 1997 on re-released on May 24, 2006. Published by Starchild, it consists of 5 tracks, one karaoke.

Soundtrack[edit]

  • Soul's Refrain
  • Thanatos -If I can't be yours-
  • Heart, Return to your origin
  • Thanatos -If I can't be yours- "Nine Years After Mix"
  • Soul's Refrain off vocal version/karaoke

Background Track[edit]

The background theme used for Neon Genesis Evangelion was performed by the Eminence Orchestra and conducted and composed by Shiro Sagisu. The theme was produced by Hideaki Anno.


This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!
